faqData.title: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our services

q1.question: What exactly does Devo Media do?
q1.answer: Devo Media is a full-service content and marketing agency specializing in social media management, video production, drone footage, and website development. We help brands and entrepreneurs become visible with content that truly makes an impact.

q2.question: Who is Devo Media suitable for?
q2.answer: Our services are suitable for businesses, artists, and organizations that want to grow their brand in a professional and consistent manner. Whether you're a local entrepreneur or an emerging brand, we offer packages that grow with your ambitions.

q3.question: How does the collaboration work?
q3.answer: We start with an introductory meeting where we discuss goals, style, and target audience. Then we create a content strategy, plan shooting days, and proceed to production and delivery. Everything is coordinated step by step so the final result perfectly matches your brand.

q4.question: What's included in the video packages?
q4.answer: Depending on the chosen package, this includes: Strategy and concept development, Recordings with professional cameras and lighting, Drone and FPV footage if needed, Editing, color correction, SFX/VFX, Subtitling (captions), and Optimization for Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.

q5.question: Can I also order individual videos?
q5.answer: Yes, you can. However, we usually recommend a minimum package of 6–8 videos, because volume and consistency are essential to achieve results on social media.

q6.question: What does a collaboration with Devo Media cost?
q6.answer: Our prices vary depending on the package and content frequency. We offer flexible packages starting from €500 per month and grow with your business. All prices are fixed and non-negotiable, but may be adjusted in the future based on market developments or production requirements.

q7.question: How long does it take before the content is ready?
q7.answer: On average, we deliver videos within 5–10 working days after the shooting day. For larger productions (such as events or aftermovies), we agree on the delivery time in advance.

q8.question: Does Devo Media also deliver photos or only video?
q8.answer: We specialize in video and drone content, but can add photography to a package if desired. This is discussed in advance during the planning phase.

q9.question: What if I have specific wishes?
q9.answer: No problem, every project is custom work. We discuss your vision, target audience and style and ensure everything aligns with your brand identity.

q10.question: How can I get started with Devo Media?
q10.answer: Simple: send us a message via info@devomedia.nl or via Instagram. We'll schedule a brief conversation to discuss your goals and then prepare a personalized proposal that fits your brand and budget.

footerTagline: Professional content creation in the Netherlands

aboutPage.seoTitle: About Me - Devo Media | Bryan's Story
aboutPage.seoDescription: Discover the story behind Devo Media. From Aruba to the Netherlands, 7+ years of experience in content creation and video production for 35+ businesses.
aboutPage.seoKeywords: about devo media, bryan videographer, content creator aruba, video production netherlands, brand story
aboutPage.title: About Me
aboutPage.para1: I come from the picturesque island of Aruba, a small gem in the Caribbean. Over the past 7 years I have immersed myself in the dynamic world of content creation, particularly in gaming and social media. Driven by a passion to explore my creative potential, I set out to discover what truly captivates me.
aboutPage.para2: Two years ago I took the leap and moved to the Netherlands, driven by my entrepreneurial dream of building my own company. Just five months into this new chapter, I began producing promotional videos for restaurants and reggae events, sharpening my skills and steadily growing my portfolio.
aboutPage.para3: With a solid foundation of experience and now 35+ businesses I have worked with, I wanted to create something unique that would truly make an impact — and that is how Devo Media was born.
aboutPage.devoPara1: Devo Media is the result of my years of experience in content creation, videography and social media. It is a brand that combines creativity and strategy, offering tailor-made videography and social media management packages designed to help individuals and businesses grow and thrive in the digital space.
aboutPage.devoPara2: The launch of Devo Media is an achievement I am proud of, and it is only the beginning of an exciting journey. If you are looking for innovative ways to grow your social media presence, I would love to hear from you! 😉

terms.seoDescription: Read the terms and conditions of Devo Media for our services and collaboration.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.definitionsIntro: In these terms and conditions the following definitions apply:

definitions.text: Devo Media Agency, established in Arnhem, registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce under number 90330706.
The natural or legal person who enters into an agreement with Devo Media Agency.
Any agreement between the Client and the Contractor concerning the delivery of services.
All work offered by Devo Media Agency, including social media management, content creation, videography and website development.

sections.title: Article 2 – Applicability
items: These terms and conditions apply to all quotes, offers, agreements and work carried out by Devo Media Agency.
Deviations from these terms are only valid if confirmed in writing by both parties.
Any purchasing or other terms of the Client are expressly rejected.

sections.title: Article 3 – Quotes and agreements
items: All quotes are without obligation and valid for 14 days from the date of issue, unless stated otherwise.
An agreement is established as soon as the quote is confirmed by the Client in writing or by email.
Prices are exclusive of VAT, unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: Article 4 – Payment terms
items: Invoices must be paid within 14 days of the invoice date, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
For larger projects a payment arrangement of 40% upfront and 60% on delivery applies.
In the event of late payment, a penalty of €25 is charged after a reminder (after 5 days).
All collection costs are borne by the Client.

sections.title: Article 5 – Execution of the assignment
items: Devo Media Agency carries out all assignments to the best of its insight and ability.
The Contractor has the right to have certain work carried out by third parties.

sections.title: Article 6 – Rights to material and intellectual property
items: All created materials remain the property of Devo Media Agency until full payment.
After payment the Client obtains a non-exclusive licence for the agreed purposes.
Editing or reselling is not permitted without written consent.

sections.title: Article 7 – Cancellation and changes
items: Cancellation must be made in writing.
In the event of cancellation after confirmation, costs already incurred will be charged.
Changes may lead to an adjustment of price and/or delivery time.

sections.title: Article 8 – Revisions
items: A maximum of two revision rounds is included per project (unless agreed otherwise).
Additional revisions may be charged separately.

sections.title: Article 9 – Delivery and deadlines
items: Stated delivery times are indicative and not strict deadlines.
Devo Media Agency is not liable for delays caused by late delivery of materials.
After delivery the Client is responsible for correct use.

sections.title: Article 10 – Liability
items: No liability unless there is intent or gross negligence.
Liability is limited to the invoiced amount, max. €2,500.
No liability for indirect damage.

sections.title: Article 11 – Recordings and drone work
items: Devo Media Agency complies with all safety regulations.
The Client is responsible for location permissions and permits.
No liability for damage due to missing permissions.

sections.title: Article 12 – Privacy and data protection
items: Personal data is processed in accordance with the GDPR.
Data is not shared with third parties unless necessary.
Appropriate security measures apply.

sections.title: Article 13 – Rates and price changes
items: Rates may be changed periodically.
Ongoing quotes remain valid during their validity period.
Prices are subject to typing errors.

sections.title: Article 14 – Force majeure
sections.paragraph: In the event of force majeure (illness, technical failures, natural disasters, etc.), Devo Media Agency has the right to suspend execution or dissolve the agreement without compensation.

sections.title: Article 15 – Applicable law and disputes
items: Dutch law applies.
Disputes will be submitted to the competent court in Arnhem.

cookies.seoDescription: Read how Devo Media uses cookies and how you can manage your preferences.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

sections.title: What are cookies?
sections.intro: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit our website. They help the website function properly and collect information about its use.

sections.title: Functional cookies (necessary)
sections.intro: These cookies are essential for the website to work and cannot be disabled.
items: Storing language preferences
Remembering cookie preferences
Security cookies
sections.note: Retention period: Session or max. 1 year

sections.title: Analytical cookies
sections.intro: Analytical cookies help us understand how visitors use the website.

subBox.label: Google Analytics (privacy-friendly)
items: IP addresses are anonymised
No data exchange with other Google services
Retention period: Max. 14 months

sections.trailing: Used for: measuring visitors, identifying popular pages, optimising the user experience

sections.title: Marketing cookies (optional)
sections.intro: Marketing cookies are only placed with your consent.
items: Social media integrations (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
Video embeds (YouTube, Vimeo)
Remarketing purposes

sections.title: Third-party cookies
sections.intro: Our website may contain embedded content from third parties that place their own cookies:

sections.title: How do I manage cookies?

groups.label: Via our cookie banner
groups.text: On your first visit you can set your preferences. These can be adjusted later.

groups.label: Via your browser
items: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies
Firefox: Options → Privacy and security → Cookies
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Cookies
Edge: Settings → Cookies and site data

sections.italicNote: Please note: If you disable all cookies, certain features may not work correctly.

disclaimer.seoDescription: Read Devo Media's disclaimer on the use of our website and services.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

sections.title: General
sections.intro: This disclaimer applies to the website and all services of Devo Media Agency. By using our website and/or services, you agree to this disclaimer.

groups.label: Diligence
groups.text: We strive to keep information current, complete and accurate. Despite this care, inaccuracies may occur.

groups.label: No guarantee
groups.text: We offer no guarantee regarding accuracy or completeness. Use is at your own risk.

groups.label: Changes
groups.text: We reserve the right to change the content at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.intro: All content on this website is the property of Devo Media Agency and protected by copyright.
items: Copying, distributing or publishing is not permitted
Changing or editing content is prohibited
Commercial use requires written consent
Portfolio material remains the property of Devo Media Agency

sections.title: Links to external websites
sections.intro: This website may contain links to third-party websites. We have no control over these websites and are not responsible for their content or services. Visiting them is at your own risk.

noteLink.text: Found a broken link? Report it via <lnk>info@devomedia.nl</lnk>

groups.label: Exclusion of damage
groups.text: Devo Media Agency is not liable for damage arising from the use of the website, unless there is intent or gross negligence.

groups.label: Maximum liability
groups.text: Total liability is limited to the invoiced amount, with a maximum of € 2,500.

groups.label: Indirect damage
groups.text: No liability for consequential damage, lost profits, missed savings or reputational damage.

sections.title: Service provision
sections.intro: Devo Media Agency works on the basis of a best-efforts obligation, not a results obligation.
sections.trailing: We give no guarantees about specific results such as growth in followers, website traffic or revenue growth. Effectiveness depends on external factors.

sections.title: Technical aspects
sections.intro: We strive for continuous availability, but cannot guarantee:
items: 24/7 uptime
Error-free operation
Absence of viruses or malware
sections.trailing: The website may be temporarily unavailable for maintenance or updates.

sections.title: Applicable law
sections.paragraph: This disclaimer and the use of the website are governed exclusively by Dutch law. Disputes will be submitted to the competent court in Arnhem.
